description: Managed Service for Apache Airflow (formerly Cloud Composer) is Google Cloud’s managed workflow orchestration service based on Apache Airflow. It lets users create and manage Airflow environments for scheduling and monitoring data and infrastructure workflows.
summary: composer.googleapis.com exposes the Cloud Composer HTTP API and the `gcloud composer` CLI; both use Google Cloud credentials, and the REST docs also indicate API key support alongside OAuth 2.0.
